narrative: Iran's vow of a decisive response to any US miscalculation in the Strait of Hormuz introduces a geopolitical risk premium, while cooling US labor market data pressures the greenback. GBP/USD leads G10 outperformance at 1.3365, supported by a strong GBP 1W average of +0.801% (n=4) versus USD -0.778% (n=7) with a 1.579% bilateral spread. Cross-asset flows show gold higher +1.59% near $4,192, equities +0.00%, DXY -0.06%, and VIX 16.1. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 as the next key policy catalyst.
